offers.title: Standard Business Website
phrases: how much does a website cost
can you build a website for my business
offers.summary: A professionally designed business website for organisations that need a modern online presence without the cost of a fully custom platform.
offers.related_response_fragment: For businesses looking for a focused website starting point, the current Standard Business Website offer is £599.
response_fragments: We currently offer a Standard Business Website package from £599.
It is designed for businesses that need a professional online presence without the cost of a fully custom platform.
The package includes up to five pages, a contact form, mobile-responsive design, basic SEO setup, Google Maps integration, three design review rounds, and deployment and launch support.
It does not include custom software, membership systems, complex integrations, or e-commerce functionality.
suggested_questions: What is included in the £599 website package?
Can you improve our enquiry process?
What happens if we need custom functionality?
